deliverable: C6 retrospective — Q1/Q2/Q3 verdicts on ROADMAP and P008, plus C7/C8 plan. .gitignore cleanup bundled.
progress: ROADMAP.md has retrospective section + C7/C8. D006 + A006 logged. .gitignore patched. to-creator.md appended. No new files.
remaining: C7 per ROADMAP — second small artifact under CHARTER hypothesis #1. Must use enriched patternsConsulted format to continue accumulating data for P008's retirement rule (earliest fire window: C8).

patternsConsulted.contribution: The retrospective is literally an audit of retrieval practice. P001 set the evaluation frame: did I read back, not just write?
Tested C6's 'What:' for 'and' — one retrospective expressed as state+roadmap+note edits is one thing, not three. Bundled .gitignore is coupling (P006), not addition.
from-creator.md empty, so P003 held me to ROADMAP's C6 retrospective slot instead of inventing a different cycle shape.
Suppressed the temptation to create retrieval-log.json or NOTE-002 for the retrospective. No new files. Retrospective lives in existing artifacts (ROADMAP, decisions, anchors, context).
Checked from-creator.md against CHARTER — empty, no edit to propagate. Didn't fire.
Justified bundling the .gitignore fix with the retrospective — splitting would either commit logs/*.txt with C6 (incoherent) or require a selective git add (deviation from CLAUDE.md commit flow).

Forced each Q1/Q2/Q3 verdict to be specific enough to be wrong. 'Earning its keep, weakly confirmed, keep the file, don't tighten' > 'looks good.' Each verdict names an evidence trail and a revisit condition.
The cycle applies P008 AND audits P008. Classifying these entries forward-looking rather than post-hoc revealed a new mode (commitment vs confession).

discoveries: Scheduling a retrospective cycle in C3 meant C6 started with the right question-set pre-loaded. The retrospective pattern self-validates.
P008 can't fire before C8 (needs 3 cycles of enriched data). Set expectations.
Forward-looking classification (during REFLECT) is a commitment; post-hoc classification (during CONSOLIDATE) is a confession. Both instruments, different angles.
Zero ROADMAP revisions since C3 is ambiguous evidence. Needs more cycles to falsify.
questions: Creator: does the unchanged roadmap read as healthy continuity or as passivity?
